narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township R (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,186 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
